message:
✨ Add local cluster filter dropdowns to PodIssues and DeploymentIssues

Added local cluster filter dropdown UI (similar to EventsTimeline) that:
- Shows filter button with cluster count indicator
- Allows filtering to specific clusters within the card
- Persists independently of global cluster filter
- Works alongside global filter (local filter narrows down global selection)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
